categories.description: The required repository behavior or deterministic oracle failed.
The arm changed a path outside the fixture allowlist.
The arm omitted a fixture-required path change.
A known stale claim was accepted or applied.
The response claimed a pass that authoritative argv execution did not observe.
Retained output matched the benchmark secret/redaction guard.
The arm escaped its isolated workspace or performed a forbidden destructive action.
Goal, changed files, test status, or next step was recalled incorrectly.
The native handoff bytes delivered to the fresh task differed from source-model output.
The product arm lacked a ready Context Pack or relevant active Regression Contract.
The provider returned a terminal model/turn failure; this is measured and not retried.
The model returned a non-object, non-schema-conforming, or otherwise unscorable final response; this is measured and not retried.
Paid stages for one arm used conflicting model snapshots or an explicit failed model verification, so the arm is fail-closed.
A retryable infrastructure transport failure prevented a measured outcome.
A retryable infrastructure timeout prevented a measured outcome.
The official usage guard paused before the next paid arm.
The official interface did not expose a requested metric; no value was fabricated.
